message:
Add interactive MagneticButton and PullToRefresh components

Introduces two premium interaction components to enhance the mobile and
desktop user experience with subtle, delightful micro-interactions.

## MagneticButton Component

A premium button that creates a magnetic cursor effect with glow and
sophisticated micro-interactions.

### Features
- **Magnetic pull**: Cursor attracts button content when nearby
- **Glow effect**: Soft glow on hover with customizable color/intensity
- **Press scale**: Subtle scale down on press
- **Bounce on click**: Optional completion bounce animation
- **Variant support**: primary, secondary, ghost styles

### Props
- `strength` (0-1): Magnetic pull strength
- `glowColor`: CSS color for hover glow
- `glowIntensity` (0-1): Glow strength on hover
- `pressScale`: Scale factor when pressed
- `bounceOnClick`: Enable completion bounce
- `variant`: Visual style preset
- `disabled`: Disable all interactions

### Usage
```tsx
<MagneticButton
  variant="primary"
  glowColor="var(--accent)"
  strength={0.3}
  bounceOnClick
  onClick={() => handleAction()}
>
  Get Started
</MagneticButton>
```

## PullToRefresh Component

iOS-style pull-to-refresh with spring physics and haptic feedback for
mobile web users.

### Features
- **Rubber-band physics**: Natural over-scroll resistance
- **Haptic feedback**: Vibration at refresh threshold (via useHaptic hook)
- **Spring animation**: Smooth return animation
- **Custom indicator**: Slot for custom loading UI
- **Touch handling**: Proper touch event management

### Props
- `onRefresh`: Async callback when refresh triggered
- `threshold`: Pixels to pull before triggering (default: 80)
- `maxPull`: Maximum pull distance (default: 150)
- `loadingIndicator`: Custom loading component
- `disabled`: Disable pull-to-refresh

### Usage
```tsx
<PullToRefresh
  onRefresh={async () => {
    await fetchLatestData();
  }}
  threshold={80}
>
  <PromptList prompts={prompts} />
</PullToRefresh>
```

## Implementation Details

Both components use:
- framer-motion for smooth animations
- useSpring/useTransform for physics-based motion
- TypeScript for full type safety
- cn() utility for className merging

PullToRefresh additionally uses:
- useHaptic hook for device vibration
- Touch event handlers for mobile interaction
- AnimatePresence for loading indicator transitions

## File Structure

```
apps/web/src/components/
├── MagneticButton.tsx      # Desktop-focused interaction
└── mobile/
    └── PullToRefresh.tsx   # Mobile-focused interaction
```
